mapper.select: SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name, s.banner_title, s.banner_desc, s.food_id, s.sub_desc, s.custom_image, f.food_name FROM seasons s LEFT JOIN food f ON s.food_id = f.food_id WHERE s.season_name = #{season} ORDER BY s.season_id

SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name, s.banner_title, s.banner_desc, s.food_id, s.sub_desc, s.custom_image, f.food_name FROM seasons s LEFT JOIN food f ON s.food_id = f.food_id WHERE s.season_name = #{season} ORDER BY s.season_id LIMIT 1
